notes: International standards body for electrical/electronic and related technologies. Joint publisher with ISO of the ISO/IEC series (covered under iso.org). Standalone-IEC standards include IEC 61508 (functional safety) and the IEC 62443 series (OT/ICS cybersecurity, jointly with ISA). Paywalled at webstore.iec.ch.

match_nodes.description: IEC 62443 — Security for industrial automation and control systems (jointly with ISA)

data.official_name: IEC 62443 - Industrial communication networks - IT security for networks and systems
data.notes: Paywalled. Multi-part series jointly developed with ISA (International Society of Automation). Parts: 1-1 (concepts), 2-1 (security program), 2-4 (service-provider req's), 3-2 (system risk), 3-3 (system security req's), 4-1 (secure product development), 4-2 (component security req's), etc. The IEC 62443 series is the de facto OT/ICS cybersecurity standard. The ISA-published edition is at secid:control/isa.org/62443.

examples.note: System security requirements and security levels.

data.official_name: IEC 61508 - Functional safety of electrical/electronic/programmable electronic safety-related systems
data.notes: Paywalled. Multi-part (7 parts). The foundational functional-safety standard; basis for industry-specific derivations (61511 process, 61513 nuclear, 62061 machinery, 26262 automotive, 50128 rail).

match_nodes.description: IEC 61511 — Functional safety for the process industry

data.official_name: IEC 61511 - Functional safety - Safety instrumented systems for the process industry sector
data.notes: Paywalled. Process-industry derivation of IEC 61508 for safety instrumented systems (SIS).

match_nodes.description: IEC 62061 — Functional safety of machinery control systems

data.official_name: IEC 62061 - Safety of machinery - Functional safety of safety-related control systems
data.notes: Paywalled. Machinery-specific functional-safety standard, alternative path to ISO 13849 for machinery designers.

data.official_name: IEC 60601 - Medical electrical equipment - General requirements for basic safety and essential performance
data.notes: Paywalled. Multi-part. The foundational medical-electrical-equipment safety standard required globally for medical device approvals. Cybersecurity is increasingly addressed in collateral standards (60601-1-2 EMC) and particular standards.

match_nodes.description: IEC 62366 — Usability engineering for medical devices

data.official_name: IEC 62366 - Medical devices - Application of usability engineering to medical devices
data.notes: Paywalled. Usability-engineering standard for medical devices; complements ISO 14971 risk management and IEC 60601 safety.
